scored_requirements.text: The vendor must migrate DDT's hosted workloads to Microsoft Azure.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or case studies explicitly demonstrating ongoing managed platform services for client workloads in Microsoft Azure.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must provide ongoing managed platform services for DDT's workloads in Microsoft Azure.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a proposal section or mapping table explicitly demonstrating that each mandatory requirement is addressed individually.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must address every mandatory requirement individually in their proposal.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a cross-reference matrix or annotated proposal mapping each claim to specific, verifiable supporting evidence.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must provide verifiable evidence for each claim made in their proposal.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or confirmation that the proposal will be or has been submitted via the AusTender portal by the specified deadline.
scored_requirements.text: The proposal must be submitted via the AusTender portal by 17:00 AEST, 30 June 2026.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide project documentation or client attestations explicitly demonstrating execution of discovery, dependency mapping, and wave planning for all in-scope workloads.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must perform discovery, dependency mapping, and wave planning for all in-scope workloads.
The vendor must design and build an Azure landing zone compliant with the Australian Government Information Security Manual (ISM) at the PROTECTED level.
The vendor must migrate all in-scope workloads to Azure.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide case studies or documentation demonstrating experience with application modernisation and containerisation, not just infrastructure migration.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must modernise nominated application workloads, including containerisation where assessed as suitable.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide executed contracts or service descriptions explicitly confirming delivery of managed platform and security operations services for a three-year term.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must provide managed platform and security operations services for an initial term of three years.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or case study excerpts explicitly demonstrating full decommissioning support for datacentres prior to lease expiry.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must provide full decommissioning support for both existing datacentres prior to lease expiry.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide evidence of a third completed migration of 500 or more Windows Server 2012/2016 virtual machines to Azure IaaS/PaaS, with a contactable client reference.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must demonstrate proven experience migrating Windows Server 2012/2016 workloads to Azure IaaS and PaaS services, with a minimum of three completed migrations of comparable scale (500 or more virtual machines each), evidenced by contactable client references for each migration cited.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documented evidence of actual achieved availability and MTTR figures from current or recent managed service operations.
scored_requirements.text: The proposed managed service must achieve a 99.95% availability SLA for Tier-1 production workloads, with continuous monitoring tooling, documented incident response procedures, and a mean time to recovery (MTTR) under 30 minutes for Priority 1 incidents. Respondents must evidence actual achieved availability and MTTR figures from current or recent operations.

All Agency data must remain within Australian Azure regions (Australia East and Australia Southeast) at all times, including backup and disaster recovery copies. The vendor must hold current ISO/IEC 27001 certification covering its cloud delivery operations, and must evidence an IRAP assessment of its proposed platform architecture at the PROTECTED level under the ISM.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide migration runbooks, project reports, or client attestations demonstrating zero-downtime migrations using Azure Site Recovery (or equivalent), with evidence of rehearsal cutovers, tested rollback plans, and production cutovers completed within four-hour windows including data loss reporting.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must provide a zero-downtime migration approach using Azure Site Recovery or an equivalent replication-based mechanism, including rehearsal cutovers and tested rollback plans. Production cutover windows must not exceed four hours per workload group. Respondents must evidence prior cutovers completed within equivalent windows, including any data loss incidents.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide case studies or documentation demonstrating production experience designing, deploying, and operating containerised workloads on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) at scale, and a sample modernisation roadmap for legacy applications.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must demonstrate an established application modernisation capability, including production experience designing, deploying, and operating containerised workloads on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) at scale, and must provide a modernisation roadmap approach for the Agency's nominated legacy applications.
Responses must address each requirement under its reference number, citing verifiable evidence (project references, certifications, audited reports, or named personnel) for every claim.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a fixed-price schedule document explicitly showing annual escalation capped at CPI plus 2% and inclusivity of all licences, migration tooling, professional services, and transition costs for Years 1, 2, and 3.
scored_requirements.text: Pricing must be submitted as a fixed-price schedule for Years 1, 2, and 3 of the engagement, with annual escalation capped at CPI plus 2%, inclusive of all licences, migration tooling, professional services, and transition costs.
Respondents should evidence prior acceptance of equivalent fixed-price structures.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a sample milestone-based payment schedule explicitly showing Project Director certification prior to invoicing and net 30 payment terms.
scored_requirements.text: A milestone-based payment schedule must be provided, with each milestone's completion certified by the DDT Project Director prior to invoicing, and payment terms of net 30 days from receipt of a correctly rendered invoice.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a CV or document explicitly evidencing at least seven years of cloud migration programme experience for the named Project Manager.
scored_requirements.text: The proposed delivery team must include a named Project Manager holding a current PMP or PRINCE2 Practitioner certification with a minimum of seven years of cloud migration programme experience, evidenced by a curriculum vitae.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide policy or contract language demonstrating that substitution of key personnel requires the Agency's prior written approval.
scored_requirements.text: Substitution of key personnel requires the Agency's prior written approval.
The vendor must also name a lead cloud architect holding current Microsoft Azure architecture certification.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or reports demonstrating operation of monthly steering committees and delivery of fortnightly written progress reports covering schedule, risk, and financial status.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must operate a monthly steering committee with Agency executives and provide fortnightly written progress reports covering schedule, risk, and financial status.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or evidence specifically demonstrating compliance with the Notifiable Data Breaches scheme.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must comply with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth), the Australian Privacy Principles, and the Notifiable Data Breaches scheme.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a documented breach notification procedure explicitly stating notification to the Agency within 24 hours of discovery.
scored_requirements.text: Any eligible or suspected data breach affecting Agency data must be notified to the Agency within 24 hours of discovery.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or test reports demonstrating that breach response procedures have been tested in practice.
scored_requirements.text: Respondents must evidence their privacy management framework and tested breach response procedures.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide contract schedules or supplier registers demonstrating delivery of at least 10% of contract value through registered Indigenous businesses in compliance with the Commonwealth Indigenous Procurement Policy.
scored_requirements.text: A minimum of 10% of the total contract value must be delivered through registered Indigenous businesses as subcontractors or suppliers, consistent with the Commonwealth Indigenous Procurement Policy.

scored_requirements.gap_note: No internal evidence found for this requirement. Provide documentation covering: Respondents must identify the Indigenous businesses they propose to engage, the scope each will deliver, and any existin...
scored_requirements.text: Respondents must identify the Indigenous businesses they propose to engage, the scope each will deliver, and any existing partnership history.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a documented quantum-safe cryptography transition plan detailing migration to post-quantum algorithms and interim crypto-agility measures.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must provide a quantum-safe cryptography transition plan describing how platform cryptography (data in transit, data at rest, and key management) will migrate to post-quantum algorithms by 2030, including interim crypto-agility measures.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or reports demonstrating quarterly carbon footprint reporting and year-on-year reduction targets for Azure consumption.
scored_requirements.text: Quarterly reporting of the carbon footprint attributable to the Agency's Azure consumption, with year-on-year reduction targets.

scored_requirements.gap_note: No internal evidence found for this requirement. Provide documentation covering: An ongoing FinOps practice with quarterly optimisation reviews and a shared-savings mechanism for realised cost reductio...
scored_requirements.text: An ongoing FinOps practice with quarterly optimisation reviews and a shared-savings mechanism for realised cost reductions.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a compliance matrix or checklist explicitly mapping responses to each mandatory requirement to demonstrate all are addressed.
scored_requirements.text: Proposals that fail to address any mandatory requirement will be excluded from further evaluation.
Technical capability and migration approach will account for 40% of the proposal evaluation score.
Price and commercial terms will account for 30% of the proposal evaluation score.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a governance framework document and additional team CVs to demonstrate overall team experience and governance approach.
scored_requirements.text: Team experience and governance will account for 20% of the proposal evaluation score.

scored_requirements.gap_note: No internal evidence found for this requirement. Provide documentation covering: Risk management and compliance will account for 10% of the proposal evaluation score....
scored_requirements.text: Risk management and compliance will account for 10% of the proposal evaluation score.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide internal policy or process documentation demonstrating compliance with minimum proposal scoring thresholds.
scored_requirements.text: Proposals scoring below 60% overall will not proceed to the negotiation stage.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or policy confirming the company's ability to deliver presentations and participate in clarification processes as required by the Agency.
scored_requirements.text: The Agency may seek clarification, conduct reference checks, and require presentations from shortlisted respondents.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide internal correspondence or submission confirmation demonstrating proposals have been or will be lodged via the AusTender portal by the specified deadline.
scored_requirements.text: Proposals must be lodged via the AusTender portal no later than 17:00 AEST on 30 June 2026.

scored_requirements.gap_note: No internal evidence found for this requirement. Provide documentation covering: Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances....
scored_requirements.text: Late submissions will not be accepted under any circumstances.

scored_requirements.gap_note: No internal evidence found for this requirement. Provide documentation covering: Proposals must be submitted as a single PDF of no more than 60 pages, structured to address each requirement reference (...
scored_requirements.text: Proposals must be submitted as a single PDF of no more than 60 pages, structured to address each requirement reference (MR-1 through MR-12, DR-1 and DR-2) in order.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide correspondence or process documentation confirming questions are lodged via AusTender forum by the specified deadline.
scored_requirements.text: Questions must be lodged through the AusTender forum no later than 20 June 2026; answers will be published to all registered respondents.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a copy of the RFP terms or proposal cover letter explicitly acknowledging the Agency's right not to accept the lowest-priced or any proposal.
scored_requirements.text: The Agency is not bound to accept the lowest-priced or any proposal.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide contract terms or correspondence explicitly acknowledging the Agency's right to discontinue the process at any time.
scored_requirements.text: The Agency may discontinue this process at any time.

scored_requirements.gap_note: No internal evidence found for this requirement. Provide documentation covering: Respondents bear their own costs of participation....
scored_requirements.text: Respondents bear their own costs of participation.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a proposal or contractual document explicitly stating proposal validity for at least 120 days from submission.
scored_requirements.text: Proposals must remain valid for 120 days from the submission deadline.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide executed contract excerpts or legal correspondence demonstrating acceptance of Commonwealth contract terms, including liquidated damages, key personnel, and step-in rights.
scored_requirements.text: The successful respondent will be required to enter into the Commonwealth contract attached as Annex C, including provisions for liquidated damages, key personnel, and step-in rights.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or case studies explicitly demonstrating migration and management of Windows Server 2012 R2/2016, Windows Server 2019, and RHEL 8 instances at the specified scale.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must support migration and management of approximately 580 virtual machines, including 430 Windows Server 2012 R2/2016, 95 Windows Server 2019, and 55 RHEL 8 instances.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a case study or reference explicitly demonstrating migration and management of at least 36 SQL Server instances (2014-2019) totaling 48 TB of data.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must be capable of migrating and managing 36 SQL Server instances (2014-2019) totaling 48 TB of data.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide case studies or project documentation demonstrating management of at least 410 TB of SAN and NAS storage.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must handle approximately 410 TB of storage across SAN and NAS tiers.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide technical documentation or project evidence demonstrating experience with dual 10 Gbps datacentre links and ExpressRoute integration planning.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must accommodate dual 10 Gbps network links between datacentres and plan for ExpressRoute integration, which is not yet provisioned.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or case studies explicitly demonstrating integration with Active Directory at 2016 functional level and Entra ID Connect synchronisation.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must integrate with an Active Directory environment at 2016 functional level with Entra ID Connect synchronisation.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide backup policy documentation demonstrating nightly full backups to disk with 35-day retention and quarterly archive to tape.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must support nightly full backups to disk with 35-day retention and quarterly archive to tape.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or case studies demonstrating that cutover windows for Tier-1 workloads are consistently limited to a maximum of four hours.
scored_requirements.text: For Tier-1 workloads (24 applications), the vendor must ensure 99.95% availability and limit cutover windows to a maximum of four hours.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or case studies specifically demonstrating migration and management of Tier-2 workloads, including internal corporate and case-management applications, at the required scale.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must support migration and management of Tier-2 workloads, including 61 internal corporate and case-management applications.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide documentation or case studies explicitly demonstrating migration and management of Tier-3 workloads, including development, test, and archive workloads.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must support migration and management of Tier-3 workloads, including development, test, and archive workloads.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a case study or project documentation demonstrating assessment of nominated legacy applications specifically for containerisation or re-platforming.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must assess 8 nominated legacy applications for containerisation or re-platforming during the engagement.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide contract evidence or project plans demonstrating datacentre decommissioning and lease exit completed by 30 June 2027.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor must ensure datacentre decommissioning and lease exit is completed by 30 June 2027.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a project plan or schedule explicitly demonstrating the ability to meet a lease-exit date of 30 June 2027.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor may propose an alternative project timeline provided the lease-exit date of 30 June 2027 is met.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide executed contract language or SOW excerpts explicitly stating the vendor assumes delivery risk and rollback cost liability for failed migration cutovers.
scored_requirements.text: The vendor bears delivery risk for migration execution, including rollback costs arising from failed cutovers.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide contract excerpts or policy documents explicitly confirming acceptance of liquidated damages for missed lease-exit milestones.
scored_requirements.text: Liquidated damages will apply to missed lease-exit milestones attributable to the vendor.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide contract excerpts or policy documents explicitly stating acceptance of unlimited liability for privacy or security breaches in line with Commonwealth contracting norms.
scored_requirements.text: Caps on liability will be negotiated with the preferred respondent within Commonwealth contracting norms; unlimited liability applies for breach of privacy or security obligations.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a compliance matrix or statement explicitly confirming that mandatory requirements assessed as non-compliant will result in exclusion from the process.
scored_requirements.text: Mandatory requirements assessed as non-compliant result in exclusion from the process.

scored_requirements.gap_note: Provide a remediation plan document or justification template demonstrating how partial compliance on mandatory requirements is addressed and remediated.
scored_requirements.text: Partial compliance on mandatory requirements must be justified with a credible remediation plan.
